description:
This application demonstrates the Monitoring & Diagnostic Service (MDS) on the Thingy:53, providing observability for diagnosing issues and performance monitoring. Additionally, it supports over-the-air (OTA) updates with nRF Cloud OTA.

Usage:
1. Install the sample on Thingy:53. It will advertise as "Nordic MDS 3.1.1 (100)".
2. Download and open nRF Connect Device Manager app using the button below.
3. Select "Nordic MDS 3.1.1 (100)".
4. Tap "Check for Updates" on the Image tab to download the latest version.
5. Tap "Start" button and select "Confirm only" mode to begin update.
When complete, Thingy:53 will advertise as "Nordic MDS 3.1.1 (200)".

versions.release_notes: Initial release from NCS 3.1.1. This version can be updated to 3.1.1.200 using nRF Cloud OTA.
